glosses.vi: quà lưu niệm; đồ lưu niệm

sentences.target: Ich kaufe dir ein Souvenir aus Rom.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkaʊ̯fə diːɐ̯ aɪ̯n zuvəˈniːɐ̯ aʊ̯s ʁoːm/

translations.de: Ich kaufe dir ein Souvenir aus Rom.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkaʊ̯fə diːɐ̯ aɪ̯n zuvəˈniːɐ̯ aʊ̯s ʁoːm/
translations.en: I'm buying you a souvenir from Rome.
translations.es: Te compro un souvenir de Roma.
translations.fr: Je t’achète un souvenir de Rome.
translations.it: Ti compro un souvenir da Roma.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在罗马给你买个纪念品。
translations.yue: 我喺羅馬買件手信畀你。
translations.ru: Я куплю тебе сувенир из Рима.
translations.pt: Vou te comprar uma lembrança de Roma.
translations.vi: Mình mua cho bạn một món quà lưu niệm từ Rome.
translations.nl: Ik koop een souvenir voor je in Rome.
translations.uk: Я куплю тобі сувенір з Рима.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे लिए रोम से एक यादगार खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σου αγοράζω ένα αναμνηστικό από τη Ρώμη.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøper en suvenir til deg i Roma.
translations.sv: Jag köper en souvenir till dig i Rom.
translations.ro: Îți cumpăr un suvenir din Roma.
translations.da: Jeg køber en souvenir til dig i Rom.
translations.ja: ローマで君にお土産を買うね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb (present, 1st sg) of a transitive action; takes an accusative direct object and a dative recipient.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of the buying event.
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Neuter noun (loanword); accusative direct object of 'kaufe'.
Preposition governing dative; marks origin/source.
Proper noun (city name); dative complement to 'aus' indicating source.

sentences.target: Das Souvenir erinnert mich an den Strand.
sentences.reading: /das zuvəˈniːɐ̯ ɛʁˈɪnɐt mɪç an den ʃtʁant/

translations.de: Das Souvenir erinnert mich an den Strand.
translations.ipa: /das zuvəˈniːɐ̯ ɛʁˈɪnɐt mɪç an den ʃtʁant/
translations.en: The souvenir reminds me of the beach.
translations.es: El souvenir me recuerda a la playa.
translations.fr: Le souvenir me rappelle la plage.
translations.it: Il souvenir mi ricorda la spiaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件纪念品让我想起海滩。
translations.yue: 呢件手信令我諗起沙灘。
translations.pt: O souvenir me faz lembrar a praia.
translations.vi: Món quà lưu niệm này làm tôi nhớ đến bãi biển.
translations.nl: Het souvenir doet me aan het strand denken.
translations.uk: Цей сувенір нагадує мені про пляж.
translations.hu: Ez a szuvenír a tengerpartra emlékeztet.
translations.hi: यह यादगार मुझे समुद्र तट की याद दिलाती है.
translations.el: Αυτό το αναμνηστικό μου θυμίζει την παραλία.
translations.nb: Denne suveniren minner meg om stranden.
translations.sv: Den här souveniren påminner mig om stranden.
translations.ro: Acest suvenir îmi amintește de plajă.
translations.da: Denne souvenir minder mig om stranden.
translations.ja: このお土産を見ると海辺を思い出す。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Neuter noun; subject of the clause, controls 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Finite verb (present, 3rd sg); valency: takes an accusative object ('mich') and a prepositional complement with 'an' + accusative.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object of 'erinnert'.
Preposition governing accusative here (as selected by 'erinnern'); introduces the theme of the memory.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of the prepositional object.
Masculine noun; accusative object of the preposition 'an' as complement to 'erinnert'.

sentences.target: Wir stellen das Souvenir ins Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Wir stellen das Souvenir ins Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: We're putting the souvenir in the living room.
translations.es: Vamos a poner el souvenir en la sala de estar.
translations.fr: On met le souvenir dans le salon.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把这件纪念品放在客厅里。
translations.yue: 我哋將呢件手信擺喺客廳。
translations.pt: Vamos colocar o souvenir na sala.
translations.vi: Chúng mình để món quà lưu niệm trong phòng khách.
translations.nl: We zetten het souvenir in de woonkamer.
translations.hi: हम यादगार को लिविंग रूम में रख रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kita menaruh suvenir itu di ruang tamu.
translations.ja: リビングにそのお土産を置くね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb (present, 1st pl); causative placement verb taking an accusative direct object and a directional prepositional phrase.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Neuter noun; accusative direct object of 'stellen'.
Fused form of preposition 'in' + article 'das' (accusative); marks movement into a location.
Neuter compound noun; complement of 'ins' indicating the target location.

sentences.target: Sie bringt mir ein kleines Souvenir mit.
sentences.reading: /ziː bʁɪŋt miːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nəs zuvəˈniːɐ̯ mɪt/

translations.de: Sie bringt mir ein kleines Souvenir mit.
translations.ipa: /ziː bʁɪŋt miːɐ̯ aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nəs zuvəˈniːɐ̯ mɪt/
translations.en: She's bringing me a small souvenir.
translations.es: Ella me trae un pequeño souvenir.
translations.zh-Hans: 她给我带了一个小纪念品。
translations.yue: 佢帶咗一件細細嘅手信畀我。
translations.pt: Ela está me trazendo uma lembrancinha.
translations.vi: Cô ấy mang cho tôi một món quà lưu niệm nhỏ.
translations.nl: Ze neemt een klein souvenir voor me mee.
translations.hi: वह मेरे लिए एक छोटा सा यादगार ला रही है.
translations.nb: Hun tar med en liten suvenir til meg.
translations.id: Dia membawakan aku sebuah oleh-oleh kecil.
translations.sv: Hon tar med en liten souvenir till mig.
translations.da: Hun tager en lille souvenir med til mig.
translations.ja: 彼女が小さなお土産を持ってきてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; subject. Ambiguous between 3rd person singular feminine and formal 'Sie' (2nd person); here functions as subject of the verb.
Finite verb (present, 3rd sg) of the separable verb 'mitbringen'; takes a dative recipient ('mir') and an accusative direct object ('ein kleines Souvenir').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Attributive adjective, positive degree; inflected (-es) agreeing with neuter accusative singular noun after an indefinite article.
Neuter noun; accusative direct object of 'bringt'.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'mitbringen'; placed at clause-final position in main clause.

El souvenir me recuerda a la playa.

Le souvenir me rappelle la plage.
On met le souvenir dans le salon.

यह यादगार मुझे समुद्र तट की याद दिलाती है.

Denne souvenir minder mig om stranden.

このお土産を見ると海辺を思い出す。
